title: Landau-de Gennes Liquid Crystal Theory Mismatch-Only Spec

E.forward: F[Q] = integral [A(T-T*)*Tr(Q^2)/2 - B*Tr(Q^3)/3 + C*(Tr(Q^2))^2/4 + (L1/2)*|grad Q|^2] dV; Euler-Lagrange: -L1*Laplacian(Q) + dF_bulk/dQ = 0
E.inverse: recover Q-tensor field (and elastic/anchoring parameters) from polarizing microscope images

d_spec_notes: Canonical mismatch-only baseline for this principle; sits at the centroid of its spec family.

s1_s4_justifications.S1: Dimensions match across all DAG nodes; operator dimensions consistent.
s1_s4_justifications.S2: Operator condition number controlled (kappa_eff=60) under declared Omega with regularization.
s1_s4_justifications.S3: Solver class Gradient flow with finite elements; nudged elastic band for topological transitions provably converges at rate q=2.0; monotone residual decrease.
s1_s4_justifications.S4: epsilon_fn evaluates cleanly across 50 random Omega samples; hardness rule satisfied (top baseline fails at Omega corner).
